name: Adele
bio: Adele's catalog is built around emotionally direct ballads that continue to monetize at a high level across streaming and global recognition.
notable_for: Power ballads, elite vocal identity, and catalog songs with broad emotional replay value.
career_highlight: Her biggest singles remain among the most replayed modern pop ballads years after release.
revenue_drivers: Streaming remains strong because her songs fit heartbreak and vocal-focused playlists.
Global familiarity gives her catalog strong long-tail demand.
Prestige and emotional recognition increase sync and catalog value.
